matched paper-style annealed regularized transport semantics

bayesfilter_gradient_status.reason: Current matched BayesFilter table runner is likelihood-table oriented. A same-scalar BayesFilter GradientTape surface requires a separate differentiable scalar harness after the filterflow scalar contract is reconciled.

scalar_normalization_ledger.interpretation: Finite gradients are present, but total/per-time normalization does not by itself explain the severe gradient magnitude mismatch. Gradient agreement is not concluded.
